---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    self-contained: false
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(htmltools)
library(geojsonsf)
library(jsonlite)

# ── 1. Find shapefiles ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
shp_dir <- "Shapefiles"
if (length(list.files(shp_dir, pattern = "\\.shp$")) == 0) {
  shp_dir <- "C:/Users/ewvan/OneDrive - UBC/RipCurrentDyeStudy/rip-dye-release/Shapefiles"
}
shp_files <- list.files(shp_dir, pattern = "\\.shp$", full.names = TRUE)
if (length(shp_files) == 0) {
  stop("No shapefiles found. Working dir: ", getwd())
}

# ── 2. Load and merge shapefiles ────────────────────────────────────────────
all_layers <- lapply(shp_files, function(f) {
  base    <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(f))
  mins    <- as.integer(substr(base, 1, nchar(base) - 2))
  secs    <- as.integer(substr(base, nchar(base) - 1, nchar(base)))
  total_s <- mins * 60 + secs
  label   <- sprintf("%02d:%02d", mins, secs)
  layer           <- sf::st_read(f, quiet = TRUE)
  layer$time_sec  <- total_s
  layer$label     <- label
  layer
})
all_layers  <- Filter(Negate(is.null), all_layers)
plume_wgs84 <- do.call(rbind, all_layers)
plume       <- sf::st_transform(plume_wgs84, 4326)

# ── 3. Area and rate calculations ───────────────────────────────────────────
plume_metric <- sf::st_transform(plume, 32610)
time_steps   <- sort(unique(plume$time_sec))

area_m2 <- sapply(time_steps, function(t) {
  sub <- plume_metric[plume_metric$time_sec == t, ]
  sum(as.numeric(sf::st_area(sub)))
})
rate_m2_per_sec <- c(NA, diff(area_m2) / diff(time_steps))

adjusted_labels <- sapply(time_steps, function(s) {
  adj <- max(0L, s - 88L)
  sprintf("%02d:%02d", adj %/% 60L, adj %% 60L)
})

# ── 4. GeoJSON list ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
geojson_list <- lapply(time_steps, function(t) {
  subset_sf <- plume[plume$time_sec == t, ]
  json_str  <- geojsonsf::sf_geojson(subset_sf)
  jsonlite::fromJSON(json_str, simplifyVector = FALSE)
})

# ── 5. Leaflet map ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
bbox    <- sf::st_bbox(plume)
map_lng <- mean(c(bbox["xmin"], bbox["xmax"]))
map_lat <- mean(c(bbox["ymin"], bbox["ymax"]))

map <- leaflet(width = "100%", height = "520px")
map <- addProviderTiles(map, providers$Esri.WorldImagery)
map <- setView(map, lng = map_lng, lat = map_lat, zoom = 16)

# ── 6. JS via raw string ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
js_code <- r"(
function(el, x, data) {

  var lmap         = this;
  var nSteps       = data.n_steps;
  var playing      = false;
  var timer        = null;
  var currentLayer = null;

  function fmtRate(r) {
    if (r === null || r === undefined || isNaN(r)) return { text: '\u2014', cls: '' };
    var val  = Math.abs(r).toFixed(2);
    var cls  = r >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative';
    var sign = r >= 0 ? '+' : '\u2212';
    return { text: sign + val + ' m\u00b2/s', cls: cls };
  }

  var container = el.parentElement;
  container.style.position = 'relative';

  var ticksHtml = '<datalist id="stepTicks">';
  for (var i = 0; i < nSteps; i++) {
    ticksHtml += '<option value="' + i + '"></option>';
  }
  ticksHtml += '</datalist>';

  var ui = document.createElement('div');
  ui.style.cssText = [
    'position:absolute',
    'top:14px',
    'left:50%',
    'transform:translateX(-50%)',
    'z-index:1000',
    'background:rgba(10,22,40,0.92)',
    'padding:11px 22px 15px 22px',
    'border-radius:8px',
    'box-shadow:0 3px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.55)',
    'font-family:IBM Plex Mono,monospace',
    'font-size:12px',
    'color:#e8dcc8',
    'min-width:360px',
    'text-align:center',
    'border:1px solid rgba(74,158,187,0.35)',
    'white-space:nowrap'
  ].join(';');

  ui.innerHTML =
    '<div style="font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.12em;color:#c4a882;margin-bottom:9px;">Time from Dye Release</div>' +
    '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;justify-content:center;">' +
      '<button id="ppBtn" style="border:1px solid rgba(74,158,187,0.5);background:rgba(74,158,187,0.15);color:#e8dcc8;font-size:17px;cursor:pointer;border-radius:4px;width:32px;height:32px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0;">&#9654;</button>' +
      ticksHtml +
      '<input id="timeSlider" type="range" min="0" max="' + (nSteps - 1) + '" value="0" list="stepTicks" style="width:220px;accent-color:#c0392b;cursor:pointer;">' +
      '<span id="timeLabel" style="min-width:48px;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:#ffffff;text-align:left;">00:00</span>' +
    '</div>';

  container.insertBefore(ui, el);

  var stats = document.createElement('div');
  stats.style.cssText = [
    'background:#0a1628',
    'color:#e8dcc8',
    'font-family:IBM Plex Mono,monospace',
    'font-size:13px',
    'padding:12px 20px',
    'display:flex',
    'gap:40px',
    'align-items:center',
    'flex-wrap:wrap',
    'border-top:2px solid #1a4a6e'
  ].join(';');

  stats.innerHTML =
    '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;">' +
      '<span style="font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:#c4a882;">Plume Area</span>' +
      '<span style="font-size:16px;font-weight:500;color:#fff;" id="statArea">\u2014</span>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;">' +
      '<span style="font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:#c4a882;">Rate of Change</span>' +
      '<span style="font-size:16px;font-weight:500;color:#fff;" id="statRate">\u2014</span>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;">' +
      '<span style="font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:#c4a882;">Timestep</span>' +
      '<span style="font-size:16px;font-weight:500;color:#fff;" id="statStep">1 / ' + nSteps + '</span>' +
    '</div>';

  el.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', stats);

  function showStep(i) {
    if (currentLayer) { lmap.removeLayer(currentLayer); currentLayer = null; }

    currentLayer = L.geoJSON(data.geojson_list[i], {
      style: {
        color       : '#8b1a1a',
        weight      : 1.5,
        opacity     : 0.9,
        fillColor   : '#e02020',
        fillOpacity : 0.40
      }
    }).addTo(lmap);

    document.getElementById('timeLabel').textContent = data.adjusted_labels[i];
    document.getElementById('timeSlider').value = i;

    var aVal = data.area_m2[i];
    document.getElementById('statArea').textContent =
      (aVal !== null && aVal !== undefined)
        ? aVal.toLocaleString('en-CA', { maximumFractionDigits: 1 }) + ' m\u00b2'
        : '\u2014';

    var ri  = fmtRate(data.rate_m2_per_sec[i]);
    var rEl = document.getElementById('statRate');
    rEl.textContent = ri.text;
    rEl.style.color = ri.cls === 'positive' ? '#2ecc71' : ri.cls === 'negative' ? '#e74c3c' : '#fff';

    document.getElementById('statStep').textContent = (i + 1) + ' / ' + nSteps;
  }

  document.getElementById('timeSlider').addEventListener('input', function() {
    stopPlay();
    showStep(parseInt(this.value));
  });

  var ppBtn = document.getElementById('ppBtn');

  function startPlay() {
    playing = true;
    ppBtn.innerHTML = '&#9646;&#9646;';
    var idx = parseInt(document.getElementById('timeSlider').value);
    if (idx === nSteps - 1) idx = -1;
    timer = setInterval(function() {
      idx++;
      showStep(idx);
      if (idx === nSteps - 1) stopPlay();
    }, 700);
  }

  function stopPlay() {
    playing = false;
    ppBtn.innerHTML = '&#9654;';
    clearInterval(timer);
  }

  ppBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    if (playing) { stopPlay(); } else { startPlay(); }
  });

  showStep(0);
}
)"

map <- htmlwidgets::onRender(
  map,
  data = list(
    geojson_list    = geojson_list,
    adjusted_labels = as.list(adjusted_labels),
    area_m2         = as.list(round(area_m2, 1)),
    rate_m2_per_sec = as.list(rate_m2_per_sec),
    n_steps         = length(time_steps)
  ),
  jsCode = js_code
)

# ── 7. Build full page with htmltools ────────────────────────────────────────
page <- tagList(

  tags$link(rel  = "stylesheet",
            href = "https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500&family=Source+Sans+3:wght@300;400;600&display=swap"),

  # Hero
  tags$div(class = "site-hero",
    tags$img(src = "sunset.jpg", alt = "Long Beach sunset"),
    tags$div(class = "site-hero-overlay"),
    tags$div(class = "site-hero-text",
      tags$span(class = "hero-tag", "Field Research \u00b7 Long Beach, BC"),
      tags$h1(HTML("<span style='color:#c4a882;'>Tracking a Rip Current Dye Release</span>")),
      tags$p(HTML("Drone-derived shapefile analysis &nbsp;\u00b7&nbsp; Surf zone hydrodynamics &nbsp;\u00b7&nbsp; 2025"))
    )
  ),

  # Dark intro band
  tags$div(class = "section-dark",
    tags$div(class = "section-dark-inner",
      tags$h2("About the Study"),
      tags$p("Fluorescent dye was released into an active rip current at Long Beach, British Columbia,
        and tracked via drone imagery at regular intervals. Each shapefile represents the extent
        of the dye plume at a discrete moment in time. Use the slider or press play to animate the sequence.")
    )
  ),

  # Photo strip
  tags$div(class = "photo-strip",
    tags$div(class = "photo-strip-item",
      tags$img(src = "lovekin_rock.jpg", alt = "Lovekin Rock"),
      tags$div(class = "photo-strip-caption", "Lovekin Rock \u2014 Long Beach, BC")
    ),
    tags$div(class = "photo-strip-item",
      tags$img(src = "shoreline.jpg", alt = "Long Beach shoreline"),
      tags$div(class = "photo-strip-caption", "Shoreline \u2014 study site foreshore")
    )
  ),

  # Map section
  tags$div(id = "map", class = "map-section",
    tags$div(class = "map-section-inner",
      tags$h2("Interactive Plume Map"),
      tags$p(class = "map-desc",
        "Step through each timestep using the slider. The panel below shows plume area in m\u00b2 and rate of change from the previous frame."),
      tags$div(class = "map-wrap", map)
    )
  )
)

# Intercept navbar links and scroll to map instead
scroll_script <- tags$script(HTML('
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  var links = document.querySelectorAll(".navbar-nav .nav-link, .navbar-brand");
  links.forEach(function(link) {
    link.addEventListener("click", function(e) {
      var mapEl = document.getElementById("map");
      if (mapEl) {
        e.preventDefault();
        mapEl.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
      }
    });
  });
});
'))

page <- tagAppendChild(page, scroll_script)

browsable(page)
```
